texts.orig: Sanctuary entry fees does not apply for stays in Taita Hills Safari Resort & Spa unless you enter the sanctuary for game activities
texts.text: Sanctuary entry fees does not apply for stays in Taita Hills Safari Resort & Spa unless you enter the sanctuary for game activities

texts.orig: Every vehicle accessing Taita Hills Wildlife Sanctuary will be subject to Vehicle Entry Fees payable per vehicle, per night

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Child Policy to Apply :
texts.text: Child Policy to Apply :

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: For Child Safety, children below 5yrs old are not allowed at Salt Lick Safari Lodge
texts.text: For Child Safety, children below 5yrs old are not allowed at Salt Lick Safari Lodge

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Children aged 5 yrs. to 11.99 yrs sharing with 1 or two adults : 50% of the adult sharing (half twin) rate per child
texts.text: Children aged 5 yrs. to 11.99 yrs sharing with 1 or two adults : 50% of the adult sharing (half twin) rate per child

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Maximum three guests per room
texts.text: Maximum three guests per room

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Children aged 5 yrs. to 11.99 yrs in own room (minimum 2, maximum 3) : 75% of the adult sharing (half twin) rate per child
texts.text: Children aged 5 yrs. to 11.99 yrs in own room (minimum 2, maximum 3) : 75% of the adult sharing (half twin) rate per child

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: If children are younger than 12 yrs, they should share rooms next to parents/adults (subject to availability)
texts.text: If children are younger than 12 yrs, they should share rooms next to parents/adults (subject to availability)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Green Season Offer: Book For 2 Nights & Enjoy 50% off from the 3rd Night onwards! Valid for stays between 1st April 25 - 30th June 25 ( Excluding Easter Holidays)!
texts.text: Green Season Offer: Book For 2 Nights & Enjoy 50% off from the 3rd Night onwards! Valid for stays between 1st April 25 - 30th June 25 ( Excluding Easter Holidays)!

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Reservation guaranteed only by advance payment. Bookings are only on request basis and subject to rooms availability
